experience.description: Interned at a health policy think tank. Assisted with research on government health policy, advocacy campaigns, and regulatory analysis. Got exposure to how policy and legislation around healthcare actually works.

sop: I'm passionate about using policy levers to improve healthcare access in India. Studying political science gave me the foundation, and my internship at a health policy think tank showed me how advocacy and legislation can actually drive change. I was really inspired by the Ayushman Bharat scheme and want to understand how policy like that gets designed and implemented. I want to work in government health policy or advocacy — the long-term goal is to be part of shaping national health legislation.
